---
title: "Navigating the Job Market"
subtitle: "A data-driven analysis of hiring trends, skill demand, and career outlooks from the Lightcast job postings dataset."
title-block-banner: "#1a2b4a"
title-block-banner-color: "#ffffff"
page-layout: full
toc: false
format:
  html:
    css: styles.css
---

::: {.hero-intro}

## About this project

We are **Team 1 of AD688 (Spring 2026)** five analysts exploring how the U.S. job market is evolving in the age of AI, remote work, and shifting industry demand. Drawing on **thousands of job postings** from the Lightcast dataset, we investigate where the opportunities are, which skills matter most, and how geography and industry shape career outcomes today.

Each team member owns a research question below. Click any card to dive into the full analysis.

:::

## At a glance {.unnumbered}
